text:
(
    controllerKey: string,
    methodKey: string,
    version?: string
  ) =>
    version
      ? controllerKey
        ? `${controllerKey}_${methodKey}_${version}`
        : `${methodKey}_${version}`
      : controllerKey
        ? `${controllerKey}_${methodKey}`
        : methodKey

e2e = () =>
    main({
      title: "E2E Functions",
      generate: (app) => app.e2e(),
      validate: (config) => !!config.e2e,
      solution: [
        "configure two properties:",
        "",
        "  - INestiaConfig.output",
        "  - INestiaConfig.e2e",
      ].join("\n"),
    })
